headers.value: default-src 'self' *.vercel.app *.vercel.sh; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' *.vercel.app *.vercel.sh; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' *.vercel.app *.vercel.sh cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; style-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' *.vercel.app *.vercel.sh cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: *.vercel.app *.vercel.sh *.gstatic.com https://fonts.gstatic.com vercel.live r2cdn.perplexity.ai cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *; media-src 'self' blob: *; connect-src 'self' *;
